fix: remove unnecessary permission operations from entrypoint.sh

The entrypoint's only job is creating the mussel user/group to match
the host UID/GID and switching to it via gosu. After the switch the
process runs as the mussel user and can manage its own directories.
Pre-creating and chmod-ing /tmp/*, /.cache/mussel, TORCH_HOME, HF_HOME
from root is unnecessary and touches dirs that don't need to be modified.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[zutils] B: Remove duplicate declarations

script.py had the Docker CLI flag resolution block and subcommand
declaration duplicated. test_cli.py had TestDockerFlags class defined
twice. Both caused basedpyright reportRedeclaration errors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[ci] F: Add prune-releases workflow template

Add templates/prune-releases.yml — a weekly cron workflow that deletes
CI-generated releases older than 90 days. Preserves releases with tags
that don't match the CI pattern ({version}-nanvix-{nanvix_version}).

Adopts production patterns from nanvix/nanvix: ubuntu-24.04 pinned
runner, github-script@v8, published_at date fallback, try/catch on
deleteRelease, best-effort tag cleanup with warning logs.

Also bumps report-failure job in nanvix-ci.yml from github-script@v7
to @v8 for consistency.

commit.message:
fix: resolve TS errors, topic boundary guardrails, model routing env var

- Fix 4 syntax errors: redline/page, state-of-the-art/page, CopilotDraftingCanvas, useOrchestratorChatbot
- Fix circuit breaker scope in draft pipeline (draftBreaker out of try block)
- Fix emit() not defined in chat stream circuit breaker
- Fix Artifact model: content → data in compare route
- Fix queue-status: PROCESSING → RUNNING (correct JobStatus enum)
- Fix negotiate routes: handle unmigrated fields with as-any casts
- Fix Uint8Array → Buffer.from() in export route
- Fix draft structure type: cast to any for Prisma Json field
- Add topic boundary enforcement to input guardrails (9 off-topic patterns)
- Make MAX_TOOL_ITERATIONS configurable via env var
- Add contract-specific complex keywords to model routing

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[ci] F: Rewrite CI workflow template

Replace the minimal nanvix-ci.yml template with a comprehensive,
copy-and-customize workflow. Key additions:

- get-nanvix-info job: installs nanvix-zutil via gh API, resolves
  lockfile (shallow) to extract package name, version, and Nanvix
  release metadata. Downloads all sysroot assets and shares them
  as a workflow artifact.
- build job: 5-config matrix (2 platforms × 3 modes), sysroot
  extraction, conditional test variants (standalone = smoke +
  integration only), failure log collection.
- release job: deterministic tag format aligned with resolver
  ({version}-nanvix-{nanvix_version}), idempotency guard,
  commented downstream dispatch.
- report-failure job: auto-creates/updates GitHub issues with
  deduplication via title search.

Release tag format matches what nanvix_zutil.resolver produces
so downstream lockfile resolution works end-to-end.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Translate all Slovak strings to English

- UI labels and buttons in .rc (Send, Save, Add, Clear, Settings, etc.)
- Comments in Sock.cpp and networkchatDlg.cpp
- Log format strings (Sent/Received X characters, checksum labels)
- Error messages (Error sending, Cannot send empty message, etc.)
- Fragment indicator: 'z' -> 'of'
- Column headers: Prezyvka -> Nickname, IP adresa -> IP address
- Rename variable bn_pridajip -> bn_addip
- Update README: remove 'UI is in Slovak' note

commit.message:
Add AI code review disclaimer to README

Summarize all fixes made across 3 review passes. Also update
protocol header description from 12 to 13 bytes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Students/Faculty CRUD, course_faculty table, and new API endpoints

- db.js: Add course_faculty many-to-many table; migrate mentor_faculty_id onto students
- seed.js: Seed course_faculty mappings and student mentor assignments
- server.js:
  - GET /api/courses now includes enrolled_count and primary faculty name
  - GET /api/courses/my for faculty's assigned courses (before :id route)
  - GET/POST/DELETE /api/courses/:id/faculty for course-faculty assignment
  - POST /api/enrollments/admin for admin-initiated enrollment
  - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/students with transactional user+student creation
  - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/faculty with transactional user+faculty creation
  - All writes use db.transaction(); deletions cascade via FK constraints

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: abhijith1945 <205045833+abhijith1945@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix remaining issues from code review round 3

- Fix receive-side format string vulnerability: separate buffer from format
- Fix manual contact add: store IP and port in separate columns
- Add minimum packet size check (>= 13 bytes) before processing header
- Add error check on socket creation in PrepareListen
- Remove #pragma once from .cpp file
- Remove stale MFC wizard markers and TODO comments

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix remaining issues from code review round 2

- Initialize header[12] to 0 to avoid sending uninitialized byte
- Fix nickname comparison: compare nickname with stored nickname, not IP
- Add null checks in list click handlers to prevent crash on empty click
- Fix format string vulnerability: move message text out of format string
- Remove leftover commented-out code

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix critical bugs and clean up code

- Fix out-of-bounds: contacts array changed from [50][2] to [50][3]
- Fix memory leak: buffer in OnReceive now properly freed with delete[]
- Fix header overflow: BYTE header[12] changed to [13] (loops iterate i<13)
- Fix CString::Append(0) crash: use AppendChar('\0') instead
- Fix byte encoding: /255 and %255 changed to /256 and %256 (6 locations)
- Fix buffer overflow: receive buffer increased to 1501 bytes
- Add error checking for WSAStartup and gethostbyname
- Remove unused fragm_message struct and commented-out dead code
- Fix redundant Sock:: qualifier in class declaration
- Initialize error/fragment variables to FALSE

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add OAuth (MSAL), Azure Identity auth providers, credential validation, and auth guide

- Implement OAuth provider with MSAL (confidential + public client flows, silent token caching)
- Add AzureIdentityAuthProvider using DefaultAzureCredential for Azure-native services
- Add validate_credentials() to ServerRegistry for startup auth checks
- Add validate() method to all auth providers (api_key, pat, oauth, azure_identity)
- Update mcp_servers.yaml with OAuth, Azure Identity, and multi-auth examples
- Add comprehensive Authentication Guide section to README
- Expand test suite from 23 to 50 auth tests (128 total, all passing)
- Add msal to requirements.txt

Peer-to-peer UDP chat application built with Visual Studio 2008, MFC,
and Winsock. Features custom protocol with headers, checksum verification,
message fragmentation, and contact list management.

commit.message:
feat: circuit breaker, risk severity gates, enhanced contract comparison

- Add AI circuit breaker (lib/ai/circuit-breaker.ts): CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states,
  configurable failure threshold, automatic recovery after cooldown
- Integrate circuit breaker into chat stream — rejects requests when AI is overwhelmed
- Record transient failures (429, timeout, 5xx) in breaker; ignore config errors
- Add risk severity gates to draft pipeline: emits 'risk_warning' SSE event for
  CRITICAL/HIGH risks with count and top 5 risk details
- Add riskSummary to draft 'done' event with severity breakdown and requiresReview flag
- Enhance contract comparison: fetch metadata + artifacts, analyze 10K chars/contract
  (was 5K), clause-level comparison, risk assessment ranking, negotiation guidance
- Add rate limiting and audit logging to comparison endpoint
- Expand comparison focus options: ip, privacy, termination, indemnification

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update README with Mermaid architecture diagram and docs cleanup

feat(git-repository): auto-detect default branch from clone_addr

resolve the source repo's default branch instead of hardcoding

is provided.

fix: BigInt serialization, audit logging, rate limiting, lazy-load dashboards

- Fix BigInt crash in childContracts totalValue and extraction-confidence
- Add audit logging (auditLog) to all draft mutation routes (10 files)
- Add audit logging to all template mutation routes (9 files)
- Add rate limiting (checkRateLimit) to draft and template CRUD endpoints
- Lazy-load dashboard widgets: ContractLifecyclePipeline, CustomDashboardBuilder,
  AnalyticsHub, ForecastingDashboard, RealTimeDashboard, DashboardBuilder,
  PerformanceMonitoringDashboard, IntelligenceDashboard, DocumentAnalyticsCharts
- All lazy-loaded components wrapped with Suspense + loading skeletons

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(git-repository): retry team-repo and team-member API calls

Concurrent PUT requests assigning different teams to the same repo
can race in Forgejo's database, causing transient failures. Add a
retry loop (3 attempts, 2s backoff) to both team_repo and
team_member provisioners.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Remove trufield_forgot_password_url() and trufield_reset_password_url() helpers
- Remove trufield_current_page_is_forgot_password/reset_password() helpers

Add pagination bounds validation to 43 API routes

Apply Math.min/Math.max bounds to limit, offset, page, and pageSize
parameters parsed from URL search params across all API routes:

- limit/take/pageSize: clamped to [1, 200] (admin/audit/export: [1, 10000])
- offset/skip: clamped to minimum 0
- page: clamped to minimum 1
- NaN fallback to default value preserved per endpoint

Prevents unbounded queries from malicious or malformed input.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: move cursor into videoContainer for perspective warp alignment

The cursor was on app.stage (separate from the perspective filter), so it
appeared at the mathematical zoom position while the video was visually
displaced by the 3D perspective warp.  This caused the cursor to drift
away from its actual click target — especially at top-left/right zooms
where the warp displacement is largest.

Fix: move cursorContainer INTO videoContainer in both preview
(VideoPlayback.tsx) and export (frameRenderer.ts).  Now the cursor
is rendered as part of the video content and warped by the same
perspective filter, keeping cursor and video perfectly aligned.

- cursorContainer: app.stage → videoContainer (preview + export)
- Cursor viewport: zoomedViewport computation → baseMask directly
- Frame renderer: add mask toggle during perspective (same as preview)
- Scene graph: cameraContainer > videoContainer > {videoSprite, mask,
  cursorContainer} — camera zoom + perspective warp both apply

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat!: switch from Compliance Policy to Proactive Remediations

BREAKING CHANGE: The solution no longer uses Intune Custom Compliance
Policies. It now uses Proactive Remediations (Device Health Scripts)
which provide:
- Configurable execution frequency (you control the schedule)
- Queryable script output via Graph API (deviceRunStates)
- Optional remediation script (auto-cleans temp files)

Changes:
- Replace ComplianceScripts/ with RemediationScripts/
  - Detect-LowDiskSpace.ps1 (exit 0=OK, 1=low disk)
  - Remediate-LowDiskSpace.ps1 (optional: cleans temp/cache)
- DeviceSyncService now queries deviceHealthScripts/{id}/deviceRunStates
  instead of complianceState, parsing script JSON output
- New config: HealthScriptId, ThresholdGB
- Reduced permissions: removed DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All
- Updated PowerShell sync script and Scheduled Task setup
- Updated README with new architecture and deployment steps

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: stop client-side modifiedTime bumps on session:idle and session:title events

The frontend was overwriting modifiedTime with new Date() on session:idle and
session:title SSE events, causing phantom timestamp updates in the session list
even without new messages. Now only the relevant state (busy, summary) is
updated — the real modifiedTime from the SDK arrives on the next session poll.

Implement compliance audit-export and regulator-reporting APIs (4 scenario flows + E2E journey tests + 530 tests) (#614)

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ludovit-scholtz <256357527+ludovit-scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix access request timeout on cold start

Root cause: The API function awaited pollUntilDone() which waits for
full email delivery (10-30s). Combined with Azure Functions cold start
(3-10s) and Turnstile verification, total time exceeded the 30s timeout.

Fixes:
- API: respond as soon as email is queued (don't wait for delivery)
- Frontend: add 25s timeout to fetch, auto-retry once on failure
  (cold start warms the function, retry succeeds immediately)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add task dashboard + DRY refactoring

- New TaskDashboard component: full-width task overview at /tasks/:taskId
  with sessions, work items, PRs, checklist, schedules, and notes
- TaskPanel sidebar only shown when inside a session
- "Task Overview" link in TaskPanel to navigate back to dashboard
- Extract shared modules to eliminate duplication:
  - src/client/time.ts (timeAgo — was 5 copies)
  - src/client/work-item-styles.ts (WI_TYPE_ICONS, WI_STATE_STYLES, PR_STATUS_STYLES, stateColor)
  - src/client/hooks/useTaskEnrichment.ts
  - src/client/hooks/useTaskSchedules.ts
  - src/client/hooks/useNotesSheet.ts
  - src/client/components/shared/EmptyState.tsx
- Handle deleted/invalid task URLs with "not found" state
- Filter archived sessions from task dashboard

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: copilot-bridge
repository.description: Just another AI agent management UI

commit.message:
perf: lazy-load recharts, add AbortController to 3 more components

- Replace direct recharts imports with lazy-loaded equivalents in 5 dashboard components
  (ProfessionalDashboard, EnhancedDashboard, EnhancedKPICard, DocumentAnalyticsCharts, ContractTypeChart)
  Reduces initial bundle size by ~100KB+
- Add AbortController cleanup to HumanReviewQueue, WorkflowAnalyticsDashboard, RateCardDashboard
  Prevents state updates on unmounted components

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: AbortController cleanup, search debounce, double-submit protection

- Add AbortController to 3 useEffect hooks in ProfessionalDashboard (11 fetch calls)
- Add useDebounce(300ms) to ClausesLibrary search to prevent API call per keystroke
- Add double-submit protection to AmendmentWorkflow (isSubmitting + changingId states)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add Move Up/Move Down group reordering UI

- Desktop: right-click group header context menu now has Move Up/Move Down items
- Mobile: inline arrow buttons on group headers for reordering
- Wires existing reorderTaskGroups API through App → TaskRail + TaskList

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
